description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy Jekyll with GitHub Pages dependencies preinstalled that runs on push to the master branch under docs/ and allows manual dispatch. Configure the workflow to deploy to GitHub Pages with read contents permission and write pages permission. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that allows one deployment at a time without cancelling in-progress runs. The workflow consists of two jobs: a build job that checks out the repository, sets up Pages, builds the Jekyll site from docs/ to _site, and uploads the artifact; and a deploy job that waits for the build job, deploys to GitHub Pages, and outputs the deployment URL.
